Commanding Bellow.name: Commanding Bellow
Commanding Bellow.description: Friendly Corsair models treat a Corsair Bo’sun as a banner.

Commanding Presence.name: Commanding Presence
Commanding Presence.description: Friendly Khand models treat a Khandish King as a banner with a range of 6".

Compel.name: Compel
Compel.description: This Magical Power targets one enemy model in range. The caster may Move the target up to half its Move Value, even if the target has already Moved this turn. They cannot Move the target out of Combat, make them take a Jump, Climb, Leap or Swim Test, lie them down or make them dismount. They can, however, make them Move into Difficult Terrain or Charge an enemy model (if able), in which case no Courage Test would be required to Charge an enemy with the Terror special rule. They can make the target drop an Object they are carrying as part of a Scenario (but not Wargear) or put on the One Ring if they carry it. Once the target has been Moved, it cannot Move any further that turn for any reason but may otherwise act normally. If the model affected by this Magical Power would normally have to Charge as part of their Move, they are not forced to when under the influence of this Magical Power.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Conduit of Angmar.name: Conduit of Angmar
Conduit of Angmar.description: If a Ringwraith model is within 6" of a friendly Shade, they may use the Shade to determine range and Line of Sight for a Magical Power. Additionally, after making a Casting Roll within 6" of a friendly Shade, a Ringwraith can choose to deal a single Wound to the Shade to add 1 to the Casting Roll.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Considerable Wealth.name: Considerable Wealth
Considerable Wealth.description:
Lotho may spend his Will Points to pay off models around him in the following ways:
• At the start of a Fight Phase, before the Declare Heroic Actions step, Lotho can spend a Will Point to use this ability. If he does, until the End Phase of the turn, friendly Hobbit models within 3" of Lotho gain a +1 bonus to their Fight Value.
• At the start of a Move Phase, before the Declare Heroic Actions step, Lotho can spend a Will Point to use this ability. If he does, until the End Phase of the turn, friendly Ruffian models within 3" of Lotho count as having the Fearless special rule.
• When an enemy model attempts to Charge Lotho, Lotho may spend a Will Point to use this ability. If he does, roll a D6. On a 2+, the enemy model stops 1" away from Lotho instead of Charging him and their Activation immediately ends.

Consuming Rivalry.name: Consuming Rivalry
Consuming Rivalry.description: Saruman may never benefit from a Heroic Action declared by Gandalf der Graue, nor may he be targeted by any Magical Power Cast by a friendly Gandalf der Graue.
linkedProfiles: Gandalf der Graue - Gandalf der Graue
linkedRules: Heroic Action - Heroische Tat - Heroischen Taten
Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Cool-headed.name: Cool-headed
Cool-headed.description: Whenever Thorin declares a Heroic Action, roll a D6. On a 5+, the Heroic Action is free and no Might Points are spent. Additionally, if Thorin declares a Heroic Action and an enemy model subsequently declares a Heroic Action, Thorin may choose to change the type of Heroic Action he has declared if he wishes.
linkedRules: Heroic Action - Heroische Tat - Heroischen Taten

Cornered Beast.name: Cornered Beast
Cornered Beast.description: If a Cave Drake loses a Duel Roll and is Trapped, then after any Strikes have been made against it the Cave Drake will lash out. When a Cave Drake lashes out, any models (friend or foe) that were Engaged in Combat with it, or are within 1" of it, will immediately suffer a Strength 4 hit.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Crossbow.name: Crossbow
Crossbow.description:
Range 24", Strength 4

A model with a crossbow cannot make a Shooting Attack with it in the same turn in which it Moved.

Crown of Morgul.name: Crown of Morgul
Crown of Morgul.description: This is a Unique piece of Wargear. Whilst wearing the Crown of Morgul, enemy models within 6" of the Witch-king, or attempting to Charge the Witch-king, cannot benefit from special rules that would allow them to automatically pass Courage Tests, with the exception of Heroic Resolve. Additionally, once per game, at the start of any Fight Phase, the Witch-king can imbue its great power to ignite his hand weapon – until the end of the turn, any model that suffers a Wound from a Strike made by the Witch-king is Set Ablaze.
Crown of Morgul.descriptionGWFAQ:
Q: Does the Crown of Morgul prevent a model benefitting from the Stand Fast of a friendly Hero?
A: No.

Crushing Club.name: Crushing Club
Crushing Club.description: Any Strikes made by a Gundabad Troll armed with a Crushing Club count as having the Mighty Blow special rule. Additionally, any model struck by a Crushing Club and not slain must roll a D6 at the end of the Combat. On a 3+, the model is immediately knocked Prone.
linkedRules: Prone - zu Boden - Modell am Boden
Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Crushing Strength.name: Crushing Strength
Crushing Strength.status: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft
Crushing Strength.description: If {character}, wins a Duel Roll he can choose to use this Brutal Power Attack. If he does, choose a single enemy model involved in the Combat. The chosen model immediately suffers a Strength 10 hit. If the To Wound Roll is successful (even if the Wound is prevented), the model immediately suffers another Strength 10 hit, and so on until either {character}, fails a To Wound Roll, or the chosen model is slain and removed as a casualty.
linkedRules: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft

Cunning Mind.name: Cunning Mind
Cunning Mind.description: Whenever Snaga benefits from the Heroic Action of an other friendly Hero, he may roll a D6. On a 5+, Snaga may regain a Might Point that he spent earlier in the battle. Additionally, Snaga may choose to not benefit from the Heroic Move or Heroic March of a friendly Hero, in which case he does not forego his Activation and may Activate as normal later in the Move Phase.
linkedDetails: Heroic March - Heroischer Marsch - Heroischen Marsch
Heroic Move - Heroische Bewegung  - Heroischen Bewegung
linkedRules: Heroic Action - Heroische Tat - Heroischen Taten

Curse.name: Curse
Curse.description: This Magical Power targets one enemy model in range. The target immediately loses 1 Fate Point. If this Magical Power targets a Cavalry model, the caster must choose whether the rider or the Mount is the target.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

\"Da! Down here!\".name: "Da! Down here!"
\"Da! Down here!\".description:
Whilst within 6" of Sigrid or Tilda, Bard the Bowman gains a bonus of +1 to his Fight Value. If Bard the Bowman is within 6" of both Sigrid and Tilda, then he will gain a bonus of +1 to his Fight Value and may re-roll a single D6 when making a Duel Roll. Additionally, during the Declare Heroic Actions Step of the Fight Phase, if Sigrid or Tilda are within 6" of Bard and are Engaged in Combat, then Bard may declare a Heroic Combat for free. If this Heroic Combat is successful, then Bard must use the following Move to join Sigrid’s or Tilda’s Combat. If this is not possible, then Bard must move as close as possible to Sigrid or Tilda.
Bard cannot use this special rule whilst he is in the same Combat as either Sigrid or Tilda, unless the other one of Sigrid or Tilda is in a different Combat within 6".
linkedDetails: Heroic Combat  - Heroischer Nahkampf - Heroischen Nahkampf

Dauer Magischer Kräfte.name: Dauer Magischer Kräfte
Dauer Magischer Kräfte.description:
Jede Magische Kraft hat eine Dauer, die angibt, wie lange sie wirkt. Die Wirkung einer Magischen Kraft endet sofort, wenn der Zaubernde getötet wird oder aus irgendeinem Grund das Schlachtfeld verlässt. Die drei Arten der Wirkungsdauer Magischer Kräfte werden im Folgenden erläutert:

AUGENBLICKLICH
Diese Magischen Kräfte Wirken sofort; nachdem sie abgehandelt wurden, enden sie. Bei diesen Magischen Kräften handelt es sich in der Regel um solche, die Schaden verursachen.

ZEITWEILIG
Diese Magischen Kräfte halten bis zur Endphase des Zuges, in dem sie Gewirkt wurden, und enden dann.

AUFRECHTERHALTEN
Diese Magischen Kräfte bleiben im Spiel, bis der Zaubernde nur noch 0 Willenskraftpunkte hat. Dann enden sie sofort.

Daughter of Rohan.name: Daughter of Rohan
Daughter of Rohan.description: If Héra is involved in a Combat where there is only a single model on each side, and neither model is Supported, then Héra increases her Attacks characteristic to 3 and may re-roll To Wound Rolls of a natural 1 when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Deadeye.name: Deadeye
Deadeye.description: If Ori scores a natural 6 when rolling To Hit with his sling, then do not make an In The Way Tests or roll To Wound. Instead the target will automatically suffer a single Wound.

Dead-eye Shot.name: Dead-eye Shot
Dead-eye Shot.description: When benefiting from a Heroic Shoot, this model may re-roll failed To Wound Rolls when making shooting attacks.

Tödlicher Schuss.name: Tödlicher Schuss
Tödlicher Schuss.description: Legolas kann in der Fernkampfphase drei Fernkampfattacken anstatt nur einem ausführen, wobei alle normalen Schussregeln gelten. Außerdem kann Legolas auch Fernkampfattacken ausführen, wenn er im Nahkampf gebunden ist, und erleidet keinen Malus von -1 auf den Trefferwurf bei Bewegung und Schiessen, solange er das Keyword Infanterie besitzt. Schießt Legolas, wenn er im Nahkampf gebunden ist, kann er auf Modelle schießen, mit denen er sich im Nahkampf befindet, und muss keine Im-Weg-Tests ablegen, um auf diese Modelle zu schießen (obwohl sie die Sichtlinie wie gewohnt blockieren können).
Tödlicher Schuss.descriptionGWFAQ: F: Gilt die Einschränkung "solange er das Keyword Infanterie besitzt" in Legolas’ Sonderregel „Tödlicher Schuss“ nur für den Teil der Regel"erleidet keinen Malus von -1 auf den Trefferwurf beim Bewegen und Schiessen", oder auch für den Teil "Fernkampfattacken ausführen, wenn er im Nahkampf gebunden ist"? A: Diese Einschränkung gilt nur für den Teil, der besagt, dass Legolas keinen Malus von -1 auf den Trefferwurf für Bewegung und Schießen erleidet. Legolas kann auch im Nahkampf Fernkampfattacken ausführen, wenn er beritten ist.

Death-touch.name: Death-touch
Death-touch.description: Any model that Wounds Ashrâk in Combat, or is Wounded by Ashrâk in Combat, must immediately roll a D6. On a 4+ the model immediately suffers the effects of the Paralyse Magical Power; however, the effects will not immediately end should Ashrâk have no Will Points or be slain.

Deep-rooted Hatred.name: Deep-rooted Hatred
Deep-rooted Hatred.description: Beechbone must re-roll all failed To Wound Rolls when making Strikes against any Orc, Uruk-hai, Goblin or Isengard models. In addition, when Beechbone Moves he must always Charge an Orc, Uruk-hai, Goblin or Isengard model if possible.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Defend the White City.name: Defend the White City
Defend the White City.description: Irolas may use the Shielding special rule even though he is not armed with a shield. If Irolas elects to shield, and wins the ensuing Combat, he may make a single Strike against one enemy model that was involved in the Combat.

Defender of Edoras.name: Defender of Edoras
Defender of Edoras.description: Whenever Haleth is outnumbered in a Combat, if he wins the Duel Roll he may re-roll any failed To Wound Rolls when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Demon of the Ancient World.name: Demon of the Ancient World
Demon of the Ancient World.description:
The Balrog may declare a Heroic Combat each turn for free.
Additionally, special rules or Wargear that would slay the Balrog instantly (such as the King of the Dead’s Drain Soul or a Morgul Blade) will only inflict half of the Balrog’s starting Wounds rather than all of them.
linkedDetails: Heroic Combat  - Heroischer Nahkampf - Heroischen Nahkampf

Der Eine Ring.name: Der Eine Ring
Der Eine Ring.description:
Der Eine Ring wurde vom Dunklen Lord selbst im Feuer des Schicksalsberges geschmiedet und birgt grosse Macht, die verheerende Auswirkungen haben kann, jedoch diejenigen korrumpieren kann, die ihn zu lange tragen.

Ein Modell, das den Einen Ring trägt, wird als Ringträger bezeichnet.

DEN RING TRAGEN
Ein Ringträger kann den Einen Ring zu jedem Zeitpunkt während seiner Aktivierung anlegen. Sobald er dies tut, profitiert er von der Sonderregel Unsichtbar. Ein Ringträger, der nicht Aktiviert werden kann (z. B. weil er in einen Nahkampf gebunden ist ist), kann den Ring nicht anlegen. Wenn ein Modell den Ring anlegt, während es auf einem Reittier sitzt, wird dieses sofort scheu und flieht vom Schlachtfeld (das Reittier wird daher entfernt), und das Modell muss sofort einen Abgeworfener-Reiter-Test ablegen.

SAURONS WILLE
Wenn ein Ringträger seine Aktivierung mit dem Einen Ring beginnt, muss sein kontrollierender Spieler einen Test durchführen, um zu sehen, ob das Modell dem Ruf des Rings widerstehen kann. Dazu würfelt der kontrollierende Spieler des Ringträgers einen W6, bevor er während der Aktivierung des Ringträgers irgendetwas anderes tut. Ein Held kann seinen Heldentum einsetzen, um diesen Wurf zu verbessern. Bei einer 3+ kann der Ringträger die Kontrolle behalten und wie gewohnt Aktivieren. Bei einer 1-2 kann der gegnerische Spieler den Ringträger jedoch während seiner Aktivierung Bewegen und ihn sogar zum Angreifen zwingen – in diesem Fall besteht das Modell alle Muttests für die Sonderregel Entsetzlich.Der gegnerische Spieler kann den Ringträger nicht dazu zwingen, den Ring abzulegen, wenn er ihn Bewegt.

Der gegnerische Spieler kann den Ringträger nicht dazu zwingen, Gegenstände aufzuheben oder abzulegen, Handlungen auszuführen, die dem Ringträger Schaden zufügen könnten (z. B. von einer Klippe springen oder einen Weitsprungtest durchführen), oder ihn in Szenarien, in denen dies erlaubt ist, das Spielfeld verlassen zu lassen.

Es ist wichtig zu beachten, dass selbst wenn ein gegnerischer Spieler den Ringträger auf diese Weise Bewegen darf, dieser weiterhin Teil der Armee seines kontrollierenden Spielers ist und alle anderen Aktionen wie Schiessen, im Nahkampf kämpfen oder alles andere, was der Ringträger tun kann, unter der Kontrolle seines kontrollierenden Spielers bleiben.

DEN RING ENTFERNEN
Der Ring hat eine solche Macht, dass jedes Modell, das ihn trägt und ihn entfernen möchte, einen Muttest bestehen muss. Dies kann zu jedem Zeitpunkt während der Aktivierung des Modells geschehen, jedoch erst nach dem Würfelwurf für Saurons Willen (falls zutreffend). Wenn das Modell diesen Muttest nicht besteht, kann es den Ring in diesem Zug nicht abnehmen und muss bis zum nächsten Zug warten, um es erneut zu versuchen.

MEIN SCHATZ!
Wenn während eines Ausgewogenen Spiels der Ringträger das einzige Modell auf seiner Seite ist und Unsichtbar ist (d. h. er trägt den Ring), dann erliegt er dem Ruf des Rings und wird als Verlust entfernt. Wenn es das Ziel der gegnerischen Seite ist, den Ringträger zu töten, ist dieses Ziel auch dann erreicht, wenn der Ringträger auf diese Weise entfernt wird.

In Ausgewogenen Spielen kann es in seltenen Fällen vorkommen, dass sich mehr als ein Modell auf dem Schlachtfeld befindet, das den Einen Ring tragen kann. Da der Eine Ring Einzigartig ist, gibt es eine Hierarchie, wer den Einen Ring trägt, wenn es mehrere Ringträger gibt. Das Modell, das in der unten stehenden Hierarchietabelle am höchsten steht, darf den Ring benutzen – das andere ist in dieser Schlacht überhaupt kein Ringträger.

1 Der Dunkle Herrscher Sauron
2 Isildur
3 Bilbo Beutlin oder Bilbo Beutlin, Meisterdieb
4 Frodo Beutlin
5 Bilbo Beutlin, Alternder Hobbit
6 Gollum

In dem seltenen Fall, dass beide Spieler einen Ringträger haben und beide auf dem selben höchsten Punkt der Hierarchietabelle stehen, dürfen beide den Einen Ring tragen – allerdings ist einer von ihnen eindeutig ein Betrüger, und nur der Gewinner kann behaupten, dass sein Ring der echte Eine Ring war!

Desolator of the North.name: Desolator of the North
Desolator of the North.description: Smaug gains a free Will Point at the start of each turn. If this free Will Point is not spent by the end of the turn, it is lost.

Devastating Charge.name: Devastating Charge
Devastating Charge.description: When this model Charges into Combat against one or more models on a 25mm base, roll a D6 for each. On a 5+, that model immediately knocked Prone.
linkedRules: Prone - zu Boden - Modell am Boden

Direktes Schiessen.name: Direktes Schiessen
Direktes Schiessen.description:
Eine Belagerungsmaschine mit Direktem Schuss benötigt Sichtlinie zum ursprünglichen Ziel. Sollte der Schuss auf ein anderes Ziel Abweichen, benötigt die Belagerungsmaschine auch zu diesem Ziel Sichtlinie, damit es als tatsächliches Ziel ausgewählt werden kann. In beiden Fällen wird die Sichtlinie vom Abschusspunkt der Belagerungsmaschine gezogen, beispielsweise von der Spitze einer Balliste oder eines Belagerungsbogens.

Nachdem das tatsächliche Ziel bestimmt wurde, führt eine Belagerungsmaschine mit Direktem Schuss – wie bei jeder anderen Fernkampfattacke – Im-Weg-Tests durch.

\"Do not talk to me of Dragon fire\".name: "Do not talk to me of Dragon fire"
\"Do not talk to me of Dragon fire\".description: At the beginning of his Activation, Thranduil can spend a Will Point to use this special rule. If he does, then until the end of the turn Thranduil has the Terror special rule. Additionally, if Thranduil has the Infantry Keyword when he uses this special rule, then each enemy model within 3" of him, that is not Engaged in Combat, must take a Courage Test in an order chosen by Thranduil’s controlling player. If the test is failed, they must immediately Move Directly Away from Thranduil as far as they can, up to the limit of their Move Value. Models Moved by this special rule cannot Move again during the turn, but may otherwise act normally.

\"Dol Amroth for Gondor!\".name: "Dol Amroth for Gondor!"
\"Dol Amroth for Gondor!\".description: Other friendly Dol Amroth models treat Prince Imrahil as a banner with a range of 6".

Dominant.name: Dominant (X)
Dominant.description:
This model counts as the number of models as shown in brackets when working out how many models are in range of an Objective, in a specific area of the board, or when working out how many models have escaped the battlefield. So, a model with Dominant (3) would count as three models in range of an Objective, or in a specific area of the board, or three models when working out how many models have escaped the battlefield. If a model would gain this special rule whilst in range of another model or specific area of the board, and then Moves off the board, they will not gain the benefit of this special rule once off the board.

If a model has two sources of the Dominant (X) special rule, then they use the highest value.
linkedRules: Moves off the Board - Vom Spielbrett Bewegen

Doorward of Meduseld.name: Doorward of Meduseld
Doorward of Meduseld.description: So long as Théoden is alive and on the battlefield, Háma and any Rohan Royal Guard within 6" of him count as having the Dominant (2) special rule.

Dragged to the Depths.name: Dragged to the Depths
Dragged to the Depths.status: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft
Dragged to the Depths.description:
Instead of making Strikes, if the Watcher is within 6" of a water feature it may use this Brutal Power Attack. If it does, select a single enemy model that was involved in the Combat and roll a D6. On a 2+, the model suffers a Wound and, if the Wound is not prevented, the model will immediately be slain.

The Watcher is then removed from the battlefield and its controlling player must roll to see if it enters the battlefield again in the same manner as described in the From the Deep special rule.
linkedRules: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft
Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Drain Courage.name: Drain Courage
Drain Courage.description: This Magical Power targets one enemy model in range. The target immediately worsens their Courage value by 1 for the remainder of the game; so a model with a Courage of 5+ that is affected by this Magical Power would then have a Courage of 6+. A model can be affected by this Magical Power multiple times over the course of the battle, worsening its Courage value each time. If this Magical Power targets a Cavalry model, the caster must choose whether the rider or the Mount is the target.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Drain Soul - Seelenraub.name: Drain Soul - Seelenraub
Drain Soul - Seelenraub.description: A model that suffers a Wound from {character} in Combat, which is not then prevented, will automatically have their Wounds reduced to 0, causing them to be slain and removed as a casualty.

Drums in the Deep.name: Drums in the Deep
Drums in the Deep.description:
For the Drum to be played, at least one Moria Goblin Drummer must be in base contact with it, have not Moved that turn, and not be Engaged in Combat. Whilst the Drum is being played it has the following effects:
• Friendly Moria Goblin models gain a bonus of +1 to any Courage Tests they are required to take.
• Enemy models suffer a -1 penalty to any Courage Tests they are required to take.
• Friendly Moria Goblin models within 18" count as being in range of a banner.
• Whilst being played, the Moria Goblin Drum counts as a banner for the purpose of Victory Points.

Du Bekâr.name: Du Bekâr
Du Bekâr.description: Friendly Dwarf models treat Thorin as a banner.

Dubious Counsel.name: Dubious Counsel
Dubious Counsel.description:
At the start of his Activation, Alfrid may choose a single other friendly Lake-town Hero model within 6" of him. Roll a D6 and consult the table below to see what effect Alfrid’s counsel has had. Alfrid may spend his Will Points to alter the score on the D6 either up or down by 1 for each Will Point spent in this manner.
1. The chosen Hero loses a Might Point and Alfrid gains a Might Point. If the chosen Hero has no Might Points remaining, this has no effect.
2. The chosen Hero immediately regains a single Will Point spent earlier in the battle.
3. The chosen Hero may re-roll To Wound Rolls of a natural 1 when making Strikes until the end of the turn.
4. The chosen Hero gains the Fearless special rule until the end of the turn.
5. The chosen Hero increases their Fight Value by 1 until the end of the turn.
6. The chosen Hero immediately regains a single Might Point spent earlier in the battle.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Dunlending Commander.name: Dunlending Commander
Dunlending Commander.description: Whilst General Targg is alive and on the battlefield, if you win the roll to choose who has Priority, and choose to give Priority to your opponent, then until the end of the turn friendly Dunland Warrior models within 6" of General Targg may re-roll To Wound Rolls of a natural 1 when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Dunlending Heritage.name: Dunlending Heritage
Dunlending Heritage.description: Friendly Dunland Warrior models within 6" of Freca gain a bonus of +1 to their Fight Value.

Dunlending War Axe.name: Dunlending War Axe
Dunlending War Axe.description: This can be used as either a spear or a two-handed weapon
linkedDetails: two-handed weapon - Zweihändige Waffen - Zweihändigen Waffe

Durin’s Axe.name: Durin’s Axe
Durin’s Axe.description: This is a Unique Master-forged two-handed weapon. Additionally, {character}, may re-roll a single D6 when making a Duel Roll.

Durin’s Heir.name: Durin’s Heir
Durin’s Heir.description: Thráin’s Stand Fast has a range of 12". Additionally, friendly Dwarf Hero models may benefit from Thráin’s Stand Fast.

Durin’s Protector.name: Durin’s Protector
Durin’s Protector.description: During the Declare Heroic Actions step of the Fight Phase, if Durin is Engaged in Combat and is within 6" of Mardin, then Mardin may declare a free Heroic Combat. If this Heroic Combat is successful, then Mardin must use the following Move to join Durin’s Combat. If this is not possible, then Mardin must Move as close as possible to Durin. Mardin cannot use this special rule if he is in the same Combat as Durin.
linkedDetails: Heroic Combat  - Heroischer Nahkampf - Heroischen Nahkampf

Durtûz, the Silver Falchion.name: Durtûz, the Silver Falchion
Durtûz, the Silver Falchion.description: This is a Unique Elven hand-and-a-half weapon. Additionally, when making Strikes against an enemy Hero model, a roll of a natural 5+ will always Wound the target, regardless of the Hero model’s Defence.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Dwarf armour.name: Dwarf armour
Dwarf armour.description:
A model wearing Dwarf armour will add 1 to their Defence characteristic.

Where a model is listed as having a type of armour in its profile, then the improvement in its Defence characteristic will already have been included in their profile. If a model has the opportunity to upgrade one type of armour to another, then they will replace one with the other – they will not get the Defence benefits of both.

Zwergenbogen.name: Zwergenbogen
Zwergenbogen.description:
Range 18", Strength 3

A model can make a Shooting Attack with a Dwarf bow during the Shoot Phase provided it has not Moved over half its Move Value during the preceding Move Phase.

Zwergenlangbogen.name: Zwergenlangbogen
Zwergenlangbogen.description:
Range 24", Strength 3

A model can make a Shooting Attack with a Dwarf longbow during the Shoot Phase provided it has not Moved over half its Move Value during the preceding Move Phase.

Dwarven Crew.name: Dwarven Crew
Dwarven Crew.description: Any Iron Hills Warrior that ends their Activation in base contact with an Iron Hills Chariot may join its crew. If it does, remove the Iron Hills Warrior from the board as a Casualty. The Iron Hills Chariot then immediately regains a single Wound lost earlier in the battle.

Dwarven Fury.name: Dwarven Fury
Dwarven Fury.description: At the start of a Combat involving Dwalin, roll a D6. On a 5+, Dwalin may re-roll failed To Wound Rolls during that Combat. On a 2-4, nothing happens and the Combat proceeds as normal. However on a 1, Dwalin reduces his Fight Value by D3 before the Duel Roll takes place.

Dwarven Lords.name: Dwarven Lords
Dwarven Lords.description:
A Dwarf King will always have the Faction Keyword of the most common type of Dwarf model in the same Army. So, if the majority of friendly Dwarf models have the Erebor Keyword, then the Dwarf King will also have the Erebor Keyword. A Dwarf King will gain a special rule depending on the Keyword they have, as listed below:

• Erebor – This model gains the Ancient Enemies (Orc) special rule.
• Iron Hills – This model gains the Fearless special rule.
• Khazad-dûm – This model gains throwing weapons.

Easterling Halberd.name: Easterling Halberd
Easterling Halberd.description: This can be used as either a pike or a two-handed weapon.
linkedDetails: two-handed weapon - Zweihändige Waffen - Zweihändigen Waffe

Edoras Shall Fall.name: Edoras Shall Fall
Edoras Shall Fall.description: During the Fight Phase, friendly Rohirrim Traitors within 6" of Lord Thorne gain a bonus of +1 to their Fight Value.

Eine Belagerungsmaschine Angreifen.name: Eine Belagerungsmaschine Angreifen
Eine Belagerungsmaschine Angreifen.description:
Eine Belagerungsmaschine kann wie andere Modelle beschossen werden. Sie kann auch Ziel einer Magischen Kraft oder Sonderregel sein, ignoriert aber alle Effekte einer Magischen Kraft oder einer Sonderregel mit Ausnahme von Schaden.

Wenn sich ein Modell in der Endphase eines Zuges in Basekontakt mit einer gegnerischen Belagerungsmaschine befindet, in diesem Zug außer Bewegung nichts getan hat (d. h. keine Fernkampfattacke ausgeführt, keine Magische Kraft gewirkt oder sich im Nahkampf befunden hat) und in diesem Zug nicht von einer Magischen Kraft betroffen war, kann es die Belagerungsmaschine deaktivieren.

Eine deaktivierte Belagerungsmaschine reduziert seine Lebenspunkte sofort auf 0. Sobald eine Belagerungsmaschine aus irgendeinem Grund auf 0 Lebenspunkte reduziert wird, wird sie aus dem Spiel entfernt. Beachte, dass eine Belagerungsmaschine niemals als Modell in Bezug auf die Gesamtanzahl der Modelle in der Armee oder auf die Moralschwelle der Armee zählt.

Eine Belagerungsmaschine hat keine Kontrollzone, kann nicht in den Nahkampf verwickelt werden und kann aus keinem Grund zu Boden geworfen werden. Eine Belagerungsmaschine hat eine Stärke von 6 für die Zwecke der Regeln, die sich auf die Stärke eines Modells beziehen.

Einen Zauberwurf ablegen.name: Einen Zauberwurf ablegen
Einen Zauberwurf ablegen.description:
Um eine Magische Kraft zu Wirken, muss das Modell einen Zaubertest durchführen. Jede Magische Kraft hat einen Zauberwert, der als Würfelwert angegeben ist und im Profil des Modells zu finden ist. Einige Modelle können bestimmte Magische Kräfte leichter Wirken als andere – schliesslich fällt es manchen einfach leichter, die Magie zu beherrschen als anderen!

Um einen Zaubertest durchzuführen, gibt der Spieler, der das Modell steuert, an, welche Magische Kraft er einsetzt, wer oder was das Ziel ist, und erklärt, wie viele Willenskraftpunkte er für den Versuch, diese Magische Kraft zu Wirken, aufwendet. Für jeden aufgewendeten Willenskraftpunkt würfelt der Zaubernde mit einem W6. Das Modell muss vor dem Zaubertest entscheiden, wie viele Willenskraftpunkte es aufwendet – sie können nicht einige würfeln, das Ergebnis sehen und dann weitere würfeln. Wenn das Ergebnis eines der gewürfelten Würfel dem Zauberwert der Magischen Kraft entspricht oder diesen übertrifft, wurde sie erfolgreich Gewirkt – die Auswirkungen werden wie in der Beschreibung der Magischen Kraft angegeben abgewickelt.

Wenn keiner der Würfel dem Zauberwert entspricht oder diesen übertrifft, wurde die Magische Kraft nicht Gewirkt und hat keinen Effekt. Helden-Modelle können Heldentumspunkte ausgeben, um das Ergebnis ihres Zaubertests zu verbessern, müssen dies jedoch tun, bevor das Ziel versucht, zu Widerstehen, falls möglich.

Eingekreist.name: Eingekreist
Eingekreist.description:
Kann ein Modell nach einem verlorenen Zweikampfwurf nicht Zurückweichen, ist es Eingekreist. Dies geschieht üblicherweise, wenn ein Modell an Gelände angrenzt oder von anderen Modellen umzingelt ist.

Ein Eingekreistes Modell weicht nicht zurück, sondern bleibt an Ort und Stelle, während die gegnerischen Modelle Zuschlagen. Sobald diese Angriffe abgeschlossen sind und das Eingekreiste Modell nicht getötet wurde, sollten die gegnerischen Modelle etwas vom Eingekreisten Modell getrennt werden, sodass sie keinen direkten Basekontakt mehr haben.

Manche Regeln verlangen, dass geprüft wird, ob ein Modell als Eingekreist gilt, um einen Effekt anzuwenden. In diesem Fall sollten diese Regeln angewendet werden, sobald die betreffende Sonderregel in Kraft tritt. Beispielsweise kann es heißen: "Zu Beginn der Nahkampfphase". In diesem Fall wird zu Beginn der Nahkampfphase geprüft, ob das Modell Eingekreist ist. Andere Regeln könnten sagen: "Während eines Nahkampfes" oder Ähnliches. In diesem Fall wird zu Beginn des Nahkampfes geprüft, bevor gewürfelt wird. In allen Fällen dieser Regel gilt ein Modell als Eingekreist, wenn es den folgenden Zweikampfwurf verliert und nicht wie gewohnt Zurückweichen kann. Kann das Modell jedoch Zurückweichen, weil ein befreundetes Modell Platz Macht, gilt es im Sinne dieser Sonderregel nicht als Eingekreist.

Einzigartig.name: Einzigartig
Einzigartig.description:
Viele Charaktere in Mittelerde sind Individuen, d. h. sie sind einzigartig. Du kannst von jedem Modell mit dem Keyword Einzigartig nur ein Exemplar in deiner Armee verwenden – du kannst beispielsweise nicht zwei Gimlis einsetzen. Außerdem können manche Charaktere mehrere Profile haben, die sie zu verschiedenen Zeiten repräsentieren – wie etwa Gandalf der Graue und Gandalf der Weisse. Auch hier gilt: Du kannst immer nur einen dieser Einzigartigen Charaktere einsetzen, selbst wenn sie unterschiedliche Profile haben.

Manche Ausrüstungsgegenstände besitzen ebenfalls das Keyword Einzigartig und können von mehreren Charakteren getragen werden, wie beispielsweise Orcrist. Auch hier gilt: Du kannst nur ein einziges Exemplar eines Einzigartigen Ausrüstungsgegenstands in deiner Armee verwenden; falls du jedoch die Wahl hast, wer ihn tragen darf, liegt diese Entscheidung bei dir.

Elbenbogen.name: Elbenbogen
Elbenbogen.description:
Range 24", Strength 3

Ein Modell kann in der Fernkampfphase eine Fernkampfattacke mit einem Bogen ausführen, sofern es sich in der vorhergehenden Bewegungsphase nicht mehr als die Hälfte seines Bewegungswertes Bewegt hat.

Elbenumhang.name: Elbenumhang
Elbenumhang.description:
Ein Modell, das einen Elbenumhang trägt, besitzt die Sonderregel Wie ein Schatten.

Zusätzlich erleiden Modelle, die ein Infanterie-Modell mit einem Elbenumhang mit einer Fernkampfattacke angreifen, einen Malus von -1 auf ihren Trefferwurf.

Elbische Handwaffe.name: Elbische Handwaffe
Elbische Handwaffe.description: Kämpft ein Modell mit einer Elbische Handwaffe im Nahkampf, ist die Wahrscheinlichkeit höher, dass es bei einem Unentschieden den Zweikampfwurf gewinnt. In diesem Fall gewinnt ein gutes Modell mit einer Elbischen Handwaffe bei einer 3+, während ein böses Modell mit einer Elbischen Handwaffe bei einer 1–4 gewinnt. Besitzen beide Seiten eine Elbenwaffe, profitiert keine Seite von diesem Vorteil.

Elven Glaive.name: Elven Glaive
Elven Glaive.description: This is an Elven spear. Additionally, a model armed with this weapon that is Engaged in Combat and is not being Supported may either gain a bonus of +1 Attacks for their Duel Roll, or +1 Attacks when making Strikes. This must be decided before the Duel Roll takes place.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Elven hand-and-a-half weapon - Elbische.name: Elven hand-and-a-half weapon - Elbische Anderthalbhänderwaffe
Elven hand-and-a-half weapon - Elbische.description:
If a model fights with an Elven hand-and-a-half weapon in a Combat, they will be more likely to win the Duel Roll in the result of a Drawn Combat. In these instances, a Good model armed with an Elven hand-and-a-half weapon will win the roll-off on a 3+, whilst an Evil model armed with an Elven hand-and-a-half weapon will win the roll-off on a 1-4. If both sides have an Elven weapon, neither side gains the benefit.

A model armed with an Elven hand-and-a-half weapon can choose to fight with it as either a hand weapon or a two-handed weapon. When a model with a hand-and-a-half weapon takes part in a Combat, they must decide if they are using their weapon as a hand weapon or a two-handed weapon before they make their Duel Roll.
linkedDetails: two-handed weapon - Zweihändige Waffen - Zweihändigen Waffe

Elven lance.name: Elven lance
Elven lance.description:
If a model fights with an Elven lance in a Combat, they will be more likely to win the Duel Roll in the result of a Drawn Combat. In these instances, a Good model armed with an Elven lance will win the roll-off on a 3+, whilst an Evil model armed with an Elven lance will win the roll-off on a 1-4. If both sides have an Elven weapon, neither side gains the benefit.

A Cavalry model using a Elven lance applies a +1 modifier on any To Wound Rolls when making Strikes in a Combat in which it Charged. This modifier is not applied if the Cavalry model Charges whilst within Difficult Terrain.
If a Cavalry model Dismounts or loses their Mount, then they must discard their Elven lance.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Elven pike.name: Elven pike
Elven pike.description:
If a model fights with an Elven pike in a Combat, they will be more likely to win the Duel Roll in the result of a Drawn Combat. In these instances, a Good model armed with an Elven pike will win the roll-off on a 3+, whilst an Evil model armed with an Elven pike will win the roll-off on a 1-4. If both sides have an Elven weapon, neither side gains the benefit.

Pikes function in much the same way as spears, and allow models to Support in exactly the same way as those armed with a spear.

Additionally, a model armed with a Elven pike can Support another friendly model armed with a pike that is Supporting a friendly model Engaged in Combat – essentially giving two Supports to the same model.

A pike requires two hands to use, and so a model armed with a pike will suffer a -1 penalty to their Duel Rolls if they are armed with a shield or a Missile Weapon.

As models armed with pikes can effectively Support at three models deep (one Engaged in Combat and two Supporting), it can be very easy to cause your own models to be Trapped, as only one model may Back Away not two. This is the risk of Supporting in such depth.

Additionally, if a Cavalry model Charges a model armed with a pike, then the model with a pike will gain a bonus of +1 To Wound when making Strikes against the Mount in the ensuing Combat.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Elven spear.name: Elven spear
Elven spear.description:
If a model fights with an Elven spear in a Combat, they will be more likely to win the Duel Roll in the result of a Drawn Combat. In these instances, a Good model armed with an Elven spear will win the roll-off on a 3+, whilst an Evil model armed with an Elven spear will win the roll-off on a 1-4. If both sides have an Elven weapon, neither side gains the benefit.

A model with a Elven spear can use it as a hand weapon when they are Engaged in Combat. Furthermore, an Infantry model armed with a Elven spear may assist a friendly model during a Combat – this is called Supporting.

Elven throwing weapons.name: Elven throwing weapons
Elven throwing weapons.description:
Range 6", Strength 3

A model with a Elven throwing weapon can make a Shooting Attack with it in the Shoot Phase, even if it Moved its full Move Value in the preceding Move Phase.

Alternatively, once per turn, a model may make a Shooting Attack with a Elven throwing weapon during the Move Phase as it Charges an enemy model. If a model wishes to use a Elven throwing weapon in this manner, then when it Charges it will stop 1" away from the model it wishes to Charge, and then make a Shooting Attack against the model. If the model using the Elven throwing weapon begins its Move within the Control Zone of an enemy model it wishes to Charge, then it doesn’t need to Move first before Elven throwing the weapon. This is made using all the normal rules for a Shooting Attack, with the exception of that Elven throwing weapons thrown in this manner do not suffer the -1 penalty To Hit for Moving and Shooting.

If the target is not slain, then the model continues their Charge as normal and must Charge the target of their Shooting Attack. If the target is slain, then the model may continue to Move as normal, and may even Charge a different target if they wish.

Throwing weapons do not count towards an Army’s Bow Limit. However, an Army can only have one third of its models armed with throwing weapons, unless specifically stated otherwise.

The bonus of an Elven weapon only applies to Melee Weapons as a model cannot choose to fight with a Missile Weapon in a Combat.
linkedRules: Moving and Shooting - Bewegung und Schiessen

Elven weapon - Elbenwaffe.name: Elven weapon - Elbenwaffe
Elven weapon - Elbenwaffe.description:
Some weapons will be described as an Elven weapon; for example, a model may have an Elven hand weapon or an Elven two-handed weapon.

If a model fights with an Elven weapon in a Combat, they will be more likely to win the Duel Roll in the result of a Drawn Combat. In these instances, a Good model armed with an Elven weapon will win the roll-off on a 3+, whilst an Evil model armed with an Elven weapon will win the roll-off on a 1-4. If both sides have an Elven weapon, neither side gains the benefit.

Some Missile Weapons may also be classed as Elven weapons; however, the above bonus only applies to Melee Weapons as a model cannot choose to fight with a Missile Weapon in a Combat.

Any weapon with the word ‘Elf’ in its name is automatically considered to be an Elven weapon.

Embedded Axe.name: Embedded Axe
Embedded Axe.description: If Bifur wins a Duel Roll, then he may choose to headbutt an enemy model instead of making Strikes. If he does, choose a single enemy model involved in the Combat. The chosen model suffers a single Strength 4 Strike from Bifur, though this will not be doubled if the chosen model is Trapped. If Bifur Wounds the chosen model with this Strike, then the axe-blade will have been freed from his skull. From this point on at the start of each Move Phase, before the Declare Heroic Actions step, Bifur may take an Intelligence Test; if the test is passed, Bifur may declare a Heroic Move that turn for free.
linkedDetails: Heroic Move - Heroische Bewegung  - Heroischen Bewegung
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Emperor of the Easterlings.name: Emperor of the Easterlings
Emperor of the Easterlings.description: The Dragon Emperor’s Stand Fast wil cover the entire battlefield, regardless of range. Additionally, friendly Easterling Hero models may benefit from the Dragon Emperor’s Stand Fast.

Enchant Blades.name: Enchant Blades
Enchant Blades.description: This Magical Power targets one friendly model within range. In the ensuing Fight Phase, the target may re-roll all failed To Wound Rolls when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft
Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Enchanting Song.name: Enchanting Song
Enchanting Song.description:
During their Activation, a Wood Elf Sentinel may sing one of the following songs to gain the relevant effect:

• Hymn of Elbereth – Choose a friendly model within 12". Until the End Phase of the turn, the chosen model automatically passes any Courage Tests they are required to take.
• Lay of Gondolin – Until the End Phase of the turn, this model and all friendly models within 3" of them gain the Terror special rule.
• Eldamar Madrigal – Choose an enemy model within 12" that is not Engaged in Combat; the chosen model must immediately take an Intelligence Test. If the test is failed, then you may immediately Move that model as if it was that model’s Activation; however, the only thing they can do is Move. A model made to Move in this manner cannot enter an enemy model’s Control Zone, dismount, lie down, be forced to make a Climb, Jump, Leap or Swim Test, and cannot Move in any way that would cause it direct harm (such as attempting to jump off a cliff). A model affected by this song cannot be Activated later in the turn.

End the Race of Men.name: End the Race of Men
End the Race of Men.description: Whilst Engaged in Combat with an enemy Man model, this model gains a bonus of +1 to their Fight Value.

Enrage Beast.name: Enrage Beast
Enrage Beast.description: This Magical Power targets one friendly Beast model within range. The target increases its Fight Value, Strength and Attacks by 2, and gains the Fearless special rule, until the End Phase of the turn, at which point the target will immediately suffer 1 Wound.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Entsetzliche Ausstrahlung.name: Entsetzliche Ausstrahlung
Entsetzliche Ausstrahlung.description: Diese Magische Kraft zielt auf den Zaubernden. Solange diese Magische Kraft wirkt, hat der Zaubernde die Sonderregel Entsetzlich.

Esgaroth bow.name: Esgaroth bow
Esgaroth bow.description:
Range 24", Strength 3

A model can make a Shooting Attack with a bow during the Shoot Phase provided it has not Moved over half its Move Value during the preceding Move Phase.

Essence Leech.name: Essence Leech
Essence Leech.description: Each time Khamûl slays an enemy model in Combat, he immediately regains a single Will Point spent earlier in the battle. Additionally, at the start of the Fight Phase, before the Declare Heroic Actions step, Khamûl may spend a Will Point to increase either his Fight Value, Strength or Attacks by 1 until the End Phase of the turn. Note this will only ever affect Khamûl, not any Mount he is riding.

Eternal Willpower.name: Eternal Willpower
Eternal Willpower.description: The Undying can spend his Will Points as if they were Fate Points.

Everyone has a Price.name: Everyone has a Price
Everyone has a Price.description: Whilst within 6" and Line of Sight of the Master of Lake-town, this model may re-roll failed To Wound Rolls of a natural 1 when making Strikes. This special rule has no effect if the Master of Lake-town has no Will Points remaining.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Exchange Elven pike for banner and Elven.name: Exchange Elven pike for banner and Elven hand weapon - Handwaffe

Exchange great bow for armour and horse.name: Exchange great bow for armour and horse

Executioner.name: Executioner
Executioner.description: If this model rolls a natural 6 during a Duel Roll, then any Strikes it makes during that Combat have the Mighty Blow special rule
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Expert Rider.name: Expert Rider
Expert Rider.description:
A Cavalry model with this special rule may re-roll the dice on any Jump, Swim or Abgeworfener-Reiter-Tests, and can pick up Light Objects without having to Dismount.

Additionally, a model with this special rule that is carrying both a bow and a shield will still get the +1 bonus to their Defence for having a shield whilst they remain mounted.

Expert Shot - Exzellenter Schütze.name: Expert Shot - Exzellenter Schütze
Expert Shot - Exzellenter Schütze.description: A model with this special rule can make two Shooting Attacks in the Shoot Phase rather than one. These Shooting Attacks are made one at a time and do not have to target the same enemy model, though both must be made with the same Missile Weapon.

Exquisite Mithril Armour.name: Exquisite Mithril Armour
Exquisite Mithril Armour.description: This is a set of Unique Mithril Armour that will add 4 to Durin’s Defence rather than the usual 3 (already included in his profile).

Faithful Servant.name: Faithful Servant
Faithful Servant.description: Whilst mounted on Snowmane, Théoden may re-roll any failed Courage Tests to Charge an enemy model with the Terror special rule.

Fallschaden.name: Fallschaden
Fallschaden.description:
Ein Modell, das in einer beliebigen Situation fällt, geht am Fuss des Objekts, von dem es gefallen ist, zu Boden. Wenn ein Modell fallen und auf einem anderen Modell landen würde, verschieben Sie das fallende Modell einfach um den Mindestabstand, sodass es kein anderes Modell überlappt oder mit dessen Base in Kontakt kommt. Wenn die Fallhöhe des Modells seiner eigenen Höhe entspricht oder geringer ist, erleidet es keine weiteren Auswirkungen, allerdings endet seine Aktivierung sofort.

Wenn ein Modell aus einer Höhe fällt, die grösser ist als seine eigene Höhe, erleidet es Fallschaden. Wenn ein Modell Fallschaden erleidet, erhält es einen Treffer der Stärke 3 sowie einen weiteren Treffer der Stärke 3 für jede volle 1 ", die grösser ist als seine Höhe.

Family Bond.name: Family Bond
Family Bond.description: Whilst within 3" of either Sigrid or Tilda (or both), Bain increases his Attacks to 2 and gains a bonus of +1 to his Courage Tests.

Family Rivalry.name: Family Rivalry
Family Rivalry.description: Lotho may not take part in any Heroic Actions declared by either Bilbo Beutlin or Frodo Beutlin.

Favour of the War Chief.name: Favour of the War Chief
Favour of the War Chief.description: If this model is Supporting a Combat, and is within 3" of a friendly Dunland Hero, then this model gains a bonus of +1 to its Fight Value for the duration of the Combat.

Fearsome Charge.name: Fearsome Charge
Fearsome Charge.description: If Dáin Charges into Combat, then until the end of turn he counts as having the Terror special rule.

Fell Sight.name: Fell Sight
Fell Sight.description: A model with this special rule does not need to have Line of Sight to be able to Charge an enemy model. Additionally, a model with this special rule can Charge or target an enemy model with the Stalk Unseen special rule with no penalty. If a Mount has this special rule, the rider may benefit from it whilst they remain mounted.

Feral.name: Feral
Feral.description: When a Fell Beast becomes a Separated Mount, it will automatically fail the Courage Test and will flee.

Feral Charge.name: Feral Charge
Feral Charge.description: When a Werewolf Charges an enemy Infantry model, they gain the Knock to the Ground bonus as if they were Cavalry. This bonus is lost if they are subsequently charged by an enemy Cavalry model.
linkedRules: Knock to the Ground - zu Boden werfen

Fernkampfattacke.name: Fernkampfattacke
Fernkampfattacke.description:
Das Modell kann eine einzelne Fernkampfattacke mit einer seiner Fernkampfwaffen ausführen.

Befolge bei einer Fernkampfattacke die folgenden Schritte.

1. Überprüfe die Sichtlinie zum Ziel.
Stelle sicher, dass das Modell, das den Fernkampfattacke ausführt, einen geeigneten Teil des Ziels sehen kann.
2. Prüfe, ob sich Modelle oder Hindernisse im Weg befinden.
Wenn die Sichtlinie zum Zielmodell verdeckt ist, musst du herausfinden, was die Sichtlinie blockiert, da dies darüber entscheiden kann, ob das Modell Schiessen kann.
3. Trefferwurf.
Würfle einen W6, um zu sehen, ob das Modell sein Ziel basierend auf seinem Fernkampfwert getroffen hat.
4. Führe alle Im-Weg-Würfe aus.
Wenn sich Modelle oder Gelände auf dem Weg zum Ziel befinden, musst du prüfen, ob der Schuss sein Ziel oder etwas anderes auf dem Weg getroffen hat.
5. Verwundungswurf.
Wenn der Schuss ein Modell trifft, würfle, um festzustellen, ob das getroffene Modell eine Verwundung erleidet oder nicht.
6. Verluste entfernen.
Jedes Modell, dessen Lebenspunkte auf 0 reduziert wurden, ist gefallen und wird als Verlust entfernt.

Fernkampfattacke: Trefferwurf.name: Fernkampfattacke: Trefferwurf
Fernkampfattacke: Trefferwurf.description:
Sobald ein Ziel ausgewählt ist, muss überprüft werden, ob der Schuss trifft. Dazu wird ein Schusswurf durchgeführt. Würfeln Sie mit einem W6 und vergleichen Sie das Ergebnis mit dem Fernkampfwert des Schützen. Ist das Ergebnis gleich dem oder höher als der Fernkampfwert, ist es ein Treffer. Ist das Ergebnis niedriger als der Fernkampfwert, geht der Schuss daneben. Eine natürliche 6 zählt immer als Treffer, unabhängig von Modifikatoren.

Ein Modell, das sich in der vorhergehenden Bewegungsphase Bewegt, aber sich nicht um mehr als die Hälfte seines Bewegungswertes Bewegt hat, kann dennoch einen Fernkampfattacke ausführen, obwohl dies schwieriger ist. Um dies darzustellen, verschlechtert sich der Fernkampfwert jedes Modells, das nach einer Bewegung in der vorhergehenden Bewegungsphase Schiessen möchte, für die Dauer der Fernkampfattacke um 1. (siehe Bewegung und Schiessen)

Fernkampfattacke: Verwundungswurf.name: Fernkampfattacke: Verwundungswurf
Fernkampfattacke: Verwundungswurf.description:
Wenn ein Schuss ein Modell trifft, besteht die Chance auf schwere Verletzungen oder sogar den Tod. Natürlich besteht auch die Möglichkeit, dass er lediglich eine Fleischwunde verursacht oder von der Rüstung des Modells abprallt und somit keinen Schaden anrichtet.

Jede Fernkampfwaffe hat einen Stärkewert, der in ihrem Eintrag in der Fernkampfwaffentabelle angegeben ist. Um zu würfeln, ob der Treffer das Ziel verwundet, vergleicht man die Stärke der Fernkampfwaffe mit der Verteidigung des Ziels in der Verwundungstabelle. Das Ergebnis gibt den minimalen Würfelwurf an, der erforderlich ist, um dem Ziel eine Wunde zuzufügen. Ist der Würfelwurf nicht hoch genug, wird keine Wunde verursacht.

Fernkampfphase.name: Fernkampfphase
Fernkampfphase.description:
Die Fernkampfphase lässt sich in mehrere Schritte unterteilen, wie unten dargestellt:

1. Beginn der Fernkampfphase
Alle Sonderregeln, die zu Beginn der Fernkampfphase zum Tragen kommen, werden hier abgehandelt.
2. Heroische Taten ansagen
Alle Heroische Taten, die in der Fernkampfphase angesagt werden können, werden hier angesagt.
3. Fernkampfphase des Spielers mit Initiative
Der Spieler mit Initiative kann nacheinander mit jedem seiner Modelle Schiessen. Falls ein Modell Sonderregeln besitzt, die zu Beginn seiner Fernkampfphase zum Tragen kommen, werden hier abgehandelt bevor ein befreundetes Modell zum Schiessen ausgewählt wird.
4. Fernkampfphase des Spielers ohne Initiative
Der Spieler ohne Initiative kann nacheinander mit jedem seiner Modelle schiessen. Falls ein Modell Sonderregeln besitzt, die zu Beginn seiner Fernkampfphase zum Tragen kommen, werden hier abgehandelt bevor ein befreundetes Modell zum Schiessen ausgewählt wird.
5. Ende der Fernkampfphase
Alle Sonderregeln, die am Ende der Fernkampfphase zum Tragen kommen, werden hier abgehandelt.

Fiery Lash.name: Fiery Lash
Fiery Lash.description: This is a throwing weapon with a range of 8" and a Strength of 7. Additionally, a model that is hit by this weapon and is not slain will be removed from the board and then placed anywhere in base contact with the Balrog, as chosen by the Balrog’s controlling player. A Cavalry model that is hit will have the whole model dragged in this way. If, for whatever reason, the model cannot be placed in base contact, then it is not moved at all. If a model placed in this way would end up in base contact with other enemy models in addition to the Balrog, then those models do not count as being Engaged in Combat with the placed model unless they subsequently Charge the placed model. This is a fire-based attack, so if a model is immune to fire-based attacks, they are immune to this attack.

Fiery Temper.name: Fiery Temper
Fiery Temper.description: After Dáin has killed an enemy model, then from that point onwards whenever Dáin Moves, he must always Charge an enemy model if possible.

Fight to the Last.name: Fight to the Last
Fight to the Last.description: If at the start of the Fight Phase Haleth is Engaged in Combat, then for the duration of the Fight Phase Aragorn and other friendly Rohan Infantry models within 6" of Haleth gain a bonus of +1 to their Fight Value. This benefit ends immediately if Haleth is slain.

Fighting from the Palanquin.name: Fighting from the Palanquin
Fighting from the Palanquin.description: Unlike a normal Mount, the Dragon Emperor does not use any of the characteristics of the Palanquin; instead, he always uses his own, even if the Palanquin’s are better. If the Dragon Emperor wins a Duel Roll, except when Shielding, then after all of his own Strikes have been fully resolved, the Palanquin may make a number of Strikes equal to its remaining Wounds. These Strikes cannot benefit from the target being Trapped (i.e., they will not roll two dice against a Trapped model) and the Dragon Emperor cannot use Might to improve the result of these Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

\"Find the Halflings\".name: "Find the Halflings"
\"Find the Halflings\".description: In Scenarios that use the Maelstrom of Battle special rule, Lurtz’s Warband does not roll to determine where they arrive. Instead, Lurtz may choose the result.
linkedRules: Maelstrom of Battle - Wirren der Schlacht

Flail.name: Flail
Flail.description: This is a hand-and-a-half weapon. Additionally, if the bearer wins a Duel Roll, then they can either make Strikes as normal or make a single Strike against each enemy model that was involved in the Combat.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Flame of Udûn.name: Flame of Udûn
Flame of Udûn.description: The Balrog is never considered to be Unarmed. Additionally, at the end of a Combat involving the Balrog, any model that suffered a Wound from the Balrog (even if the Wound is prevented) and was not slain must roll a D6. On a natural 6, the model is immediately Set Ablaze. If a model is immune to fire-based attacks, they will still suffer Wounds from the Balrog’s Strikes as normal, but can not be Set Ablaze. The Balrog is itself immune to fire-based attacks.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Flameburst.name: Flameburst
Flameburst.description: This Magical Power targets one enemy model in range. The target immediately suffers one Strength 6 hit. This is a fire-based attack, so if a model is immune to fire-based attacks, they are immune to this Magical Power.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Flames of Evil.name: Flames of Evil
Flames of Evil.description: Instead of making Strikes, Sauron may instead choose a single enemy model involved in the Combat. The chosen model immediately suffers a single Strength 10 hit and, if they survive, will be Set Ablaze and knocked Prone.
linkedRules: Prone - zu Boden - Modell am Boden
Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Flaming Ammunation.name: Flaming Ammunation
Flaming Ammunation.description: A Siege Engine upgraded with Flaming Ammunition may re-roll any failed To Wound Rolls against a Belagerungsziel.
linkedRules: To Wound Rolls|Siege Engines: Rolling To Wound

Flaming Brand.name: Flaming Brand
Flaming Brand.description: A model with a Flaming Brand has the Terror (Cavalry) and Terror (Beast) special rules. Additionally, a model with a Flaming Brand counts as 2 models rather than 1 when working out how many models are within range of an Objective Marker.

Fliegen [Sonderregel].name: Fly
Fliegen [Sonderregel].description:
A model with this special rule ignores intervening models and terrain when it Moves – flying over buildings, woods and so on, and ignoring the vertical distance as they Move. A model that Moves in this way cannot end its Move overlapping another model, within a piece of woodland terrain, or upon any surface in which it cannot balance safely (flat rock and hills are fine, but don’t try perching a model upon a sloped roof for example). Additionally, a model that Moves in this way cannot finish its Move atop a piece of terrain which it is impossible for the enemy to reach, such as at the top of a sheer rock face with no way up, or straddling one or more pieces of terrain that would allow other models to Move underneath.

If a model wishes to do something part way through its Move whilst it is Flying (such as Cast a Magical Power), then it must land in order to do so. When a model lands, there cannot be any models underneath it, and if it lands in an enemy model’s Control Zone then it must Charge that enemy model.

A model with this special rule can choose not to Fly, and in which case will treat its Move Value as 4" rather than that listed in its profile (usually 12"). If it does, then it gains none of the benefits of the Fly special rule, though it may enter a piece of woodland terrain; however, if it enters a piece of woodland terrain, it cannot elect to Fly again until it has completely left the woods.

A model that chooses to Fly will ignore enemy Control Zones as it Moves. A model that wishes to Charge when it is flying can Charge any model whose Control Zone it finishes its Move in. If a Flying model wishes to Charge a model that is already Engaged in Combat (or has otherwise lost their Control Zone) then it can only do so if it can land in a position where is is not within the Control Zones of other enemy models.
linkedRules: Cast a Magical Power - Wirken einer Magischen Kraft

Fly [Wargear].name: Fly
Fly [Wargear].description: The Dragon gains the Fly special rule and increase its Move Value to 12" whilst using the Fly special rule.

Foe Spear.name: Foe Spear
Foe Spear.description: This is a spear. Additionally, if a model with a Foe Spear is Supporting a model with an Iron Shield, they gain a bonus of +1 To Wound when making Strikes against Monster models.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Fog of Disarray.name: Fog of Disarray
Fog of Disarray.description: This Magical Power targets the caster. Enemy models within 6" of the caster suffer a -1 penalty to any Intelligence Tests they are required to take.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Followers of the Bear.name: Followers of the Bear
Followers of the Bear.description: This model treats friendly Bear models as a banner.

\"For the Dark Lord!\".name: "For the Dark Lord!"
\"For the Dark Lord!\".description: Whilst there is at least one friendly Ringwraith on the battlefield, treat this model’s Courage as 4+.

For Théoden!.name: For Théoden!
For Théoden!.description: During the Declare Heroic Actions step of the Fight Phase, if Théoden is Engaged in Combat and is within 6" of Déorwine, then Déorwine may declare a free Heroic Combat. If this Heroic Combat is successful, then Déorwine must use the following Move to join Théoden’s Combat. If this is not possible, then Déorwine must Move as close as possible to Théoden. Déorwine cannot use this special rule if he is in the same Combat as Théoden.
linkedDetails: Heroic Combat  - Heroischer Nahkampf - Heroischen Nahkampf

\"For Tuckborough!\".name: "For Tuckborough!"
\"For Tuckborough!\".description: Friendly Tookish Hunters within 6" of Paladin gain a bonus of +1 To Wound when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Foresight of the Eldar.name: Foresight of the Eldar
Foresight of the Eldar.description: At the start of the game, before either side deploys, roll a D6 and make a note of the result – this is the number of Foresight Points that {character}, has for the battle. During the roll for Priority, so long as he is alive and on the battlefield, {character}, can spend these Foresight Points to increase the roll on his controlling player’s roll for Priority. For each Foresight Point spent, increase the dice roll by 1, to a maximum of 6.

Forest Stalker.name: Forest Stalker
Forest Stalker.description: Whenever a friendly Druadan model within 6" of Ghan-buri-Ghan that is within a piece of woodland terrain suffers a Wound, roll a D6. On the roll of a natural 6, the Wound is ignored.

\"Forth, and Fear no Darkness\".name: "Forth, and Fear no Darkness"
\"Forth, and Fear no Darkness\".description: The range of Théoden’s Stand Fast is 12" rather than 6".

Fortify Spirit.name: Fortify Spirit
Fortify Spirit.description: This Magical Power targets one friendly model within range. Each time the target becomes the target of a Magical Power Cast by an enemy model, they gain an additional free dice to any Resist Test they would take. This free dice can still be rolled even if the target has no Will Points or chooses not to use any from their store.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Foul Temperament.name: Foul Temperament
Foul Temperament.description: The Mûmak has 4 Attacks rather than 3; however, it suffers a -1 penalty to its Courage Tests when seeing if it will Stampede.

From the Deep.name: From the Deep
From the Deep.description:
The Watcher in the Water can never be part of another Hero model’s Warband. When you deploy your Army, do not deploy the Watcher in the Water – keep it aside for later. During the Priority Phase, after Priority has been determined, the Watcher’s controlling player must decide if they wish for the Watcher to enter play. If they do, they must roll a D6 and on a 3+ the Watcher is ready to enter play. If this roll is failed, you must roll in each subsequent Priority Phase until the Watcher is ready to enter play.

When the Watcher is ready to enter play, immediately place it anywhere on the battlefield; however, the Watcher cannot displace other models when it enters play in this manner.

The Watcher in the Water cannot Charge on the turn in which it arrives, but may otherwise act normally.

\"Für das Auenland!\".name: Für das Auenland!
\"Für das Auenland!\".description: Während er sich innerhalb von 3" zu Boromir von Gondor befindet, darf {character} Boromirs Heldentumspunkte einsetzen, als wären sie seine eigenen.

Furchtlos.name: Furchtlos
Furchtlos.description: A model with this special rule automatically passes any Courage Test it is required to take.

Furchtsam.name: Furchtsam
Furchtsam.description: Wenn ein Modell mit dieser Sonderregel Angreifen möchte, muss es zu Beginn seiner Bewegung einen Muttest ablegen. Misslingt der Test, darf sich das Modell in diesem Zug nicht Bewegen, kann aber ansonsten normal handeln.
Furchtsam.descriptionGWFAQ:
Q: Wenn ein Modell mit der Sonderregel Furchtsam ein Modell mit der Sonderregel Entsetzlich Angreifen möchte, wie viele Muttests muss es ablegen?
A: Zwei, eine für jede Sonderregel, die einen Muttest erfordert.

Furious Tirade.name: Furious Tirade
Furious Tirade.description: Enemy Warrior models cannot benefit from a Hero model’s Stand Fast whilst within 6" of Lobelia.

Fury.name: Fury (X)
Fury.description: This Magical Power targets the caster. Friendly models within 6" of the caster who have the same keywords as those shown in brackets will automatically pass any Courage Tests they are required to take.
linkedRules: Magical Power - Magische Kraft - Magischen Kraft

Fury of the Elvenking.name: Fury of the Elvenking
Fury of the Elvenking.description: If Thranduil is Outnumbered in a Combat, and successfully kills all enemy models that he was Engaged in Combat with, then in the following turn Thranduil may declare a Heroic Combat for free.
linkedDetails: Heroic Combat  - Heroischer Nahkampf - Heroischen Nahkampf

Fury of the Hammerhand.name: Fury of the Hammerhand
Fury of the Hammerhand.description: In a turn in which Héra Charges, she must re-roll any failed To Wound Rolls when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Fury of the Pack.name: Fury of the Pack
Fury of the Pack.description: Whilst he has the Cavalry keyword, whenever Sharku Charges he increases his Fight Value to 5 and his Attacks to 3 until the End Phase of the turn.

Gandalf’s Intervention.name: Gandalf’s Intervention
Gandalf’s Intervention.description: If when Thráin takes his Intelligence Test for his Shattered Spirit special rule he is within 3" of a friendly Gandalf der Graue, then he may alter a single dice rolled as part of his Intelligence Test by 1, either up or down. If after this alteration the score of the Intelligence Test is a double, then Thráin may gain the benefits of rolling a double as described in his Shattered Spirit special rule.
linkedProfiles: Gandalf der Graue - Gandalf der Graue

Gandalfs Raketen.name: Gandalf’s Rockets
Gandalfs Raketen.description:
Zu Beginn jeder freundlichen Fernkampfphase kann Gandalf eines der unten aufgeführten Feuerwerkskörper auswählen, dann ein feindliches Modell in Sichtlinie und innerhalb von 6"seines Wagens bestimmen und einen W6 würfeln. Bei einer 2+ erleidet das gewählte Modell den Effekt des Feuerwerkskörpers. Dies ist auch möglich, wenn Gandalf im Nahkampf ist, und er kann sogar ein feindliches Modell anvisieren, das selbst im Nahkampf ist. Für diese Sonderregel sind keine Im-Weg-Würfe erforderlich.
• Zischender Pfeil – Das Ziel erleidet sofort einen Treffer der Stärke 2.
• Goblin-Knaller – Das Ziel wird sofort zu Boden geworfen. Dies hat keine Wirkung auf Monster-Modelle.
• Flammenrad – Das Ziel erleidet einen Malus von -1 auf seine Zweikampfwürfe in der folgenden Nahkampfphase.
• Der Grosse – Das Ziel erleidet sofort einen Treffer der Stärke 8 und wird, falls es überlebt, zu Boden geworfen. Dieser Feuerwerkskörper kann nur einmal pro Spiel verwendet werden.

Gaping Maw.name: Gaping Maw
Gaping Maw.status: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft
Gaping Maw.description: Instead of making Strikes, a Cave Drake may choose a single enemy model on a 25mm base that was involved in the same Combat and roll a D6. On a 2+, the chosen model suffers a Wound and, if this Wound is not prevented, the model is swallowed whole and removed as a casualty. If the Cave Drake slays a model wtih this Brutal Power Attack, they may immediately regain a Wound lost earlier in the battle.
linkedRules: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft
Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Gatekeeper.name: Gatekeeper
Gatekeeper.description: At the end of the Priority Phase, the Gatekeeper of Bree may spend a Will Point to use this special rule. If he does, the Gatekeeper may select a single enemy Infantry model within 6" and Line of Sight and roll a D6. On a 3+, the chosen model may not Move during their Activation, but may otherwise act normally. Monster models are unaffected by this special rule.

General Hunter.name: General Hunter
General Hunter.description: If this model slays the enemy General in a Combat, they immediately regain a single point of Might spent earlier in the battle.

General of the North.name: General of the North
General of the North.description: The range of Azog’s Stand Fast is 12" rather than 6". Additionally, friendly Orc Hero models can benefit from Azog’s Stand Fast.

Geregelte Mahlzeiten.name: Geregelte Mahlzeiten
Geregelte Mahlzeiten.description: Die Befreundete Gefährten-Modelle behandeln Lutz das Pony als Standarte.

\"Get out of my fields!\".name: "Get out of my fields!"
\"Get out of my fields!\".description: Whilst within range of an Objective Marker, Farmer Maggot does not suffer the -1 penalty to his Duel Rolls for using a two-handed weapon.
linkedDetails: two-handed weapon - Zweihändige Waffen - Zweihändigen Waffe

Ghostly Resolve.name: Ghostly Resolve
Ghostly Resolve.description: Friendly Angmar Orc models within 12" of one or more models with this special rule gain a bonus of +1 to any Courage Tests they are required to take.

Gift of Foresight.name: Gift of Foresight
Gift of Foresight.description: Whenever a friendly Arnor model within 6" and Line of Sight of Malbeth suffers a Wound, roll a D6. On a 5+, the Wound has been prevented and is ignored. Note that if this roll is failed, a Hero model may still use Fate Points as normal.

Glamdring.name: Glamdring
Glamdring.description: Dies ist eine Einzigartige Elbische Anderthalbhänderwaffe. Ein Modell erhält einen Bonus von +1 auf seine Stärke, wenn es mit Glamdring Zuschlägt.

Gleissendes Licht.name: Gleissendes Licht
Gleissendes Licht.description: Diese Magische Kraft wirkt auf den Zaubernden. Solange die Kraft aktiv ist, gilt der Bereich innerhalb von 6" um den Zaubernden als Tageslicht (ideal für Kämpfe bei Nacht). Außerdem treffen feindliche Modelle, die eine Fernkampfattacke auf ein Modell innerhalb von 6" um den Zaubernden ausführen, während diese Kraft aktiv ist, nur bei einem Trefferwurf von 6. Modelle können diese Magische Kraft nicht nutzen, wenn sich unüberwindbares Gelände, wie z. B. eine Mauer oder ein Gebäude, direkt zwischen allen Teilen des Modells und der Lichtquelle befindet.

Glory Seekers.name: Glory Seekers
Glory Seekers.description: If this model is Engaged in Combat with an enemy Hero, then this model gains a bonus of +1 To Wound that Hero when making Strikes.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Gnarled Hide.name: Gnarled Hide
Gnarled Hide.description: The Mûmak has a Defence of 8 rather than 7.

\"Go back to the void, from whence you c.name: "Go back to the void, from whence you came!"
\"Go back to the void, from whence you c.description: Galadriel may target any enemy model with the Banishment Magical Power as if it was a Spirit model; though non-Spirit models targeted in this way gain an additional free Will Point when attempting to Resist this Magical Power. Once per game, so long as she has at least 1 Will Point remaining, Galadriel may use this special rule instead of attempting to Cast a Magical Power. If she does, then Galadriel may choose a single enemy model within 6". The chosen model immediately suffers D3 Wounds. After using this special rule, Galadriel reduces her Will Points to 0, is placed Prone, and no longer benefits from her The Lady of Lórien or War Aspect special rules (this will mean she is then Unarmed).
linkedRules: Cast a Magical Power - Wirken einer Magischen Kraft
Prone - zu Boden - Modell am Boden

Go for the eyes!.name: Go for the eyes!
Go for the eyes!.description: Duinhir may re-roll failed To Hit Rolls when shooting at an enemy Monster model. Additionally, if Duinhir successfully Wounds an enemy Monster model with a shooting attack (i.e., a Wound is caused and is not prevented), it will deal D3 Wounds rather than 1.

\"Go for the Horse!\".name: "Go for the Horse!"
\"Go for the Horse!\".description: Friendly Dunland models within 3" of Frída may re-roll failed To Wound rolls when making Strikes against an enemy Mount.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Goblin Crew.name: Goblin Crew
Goblin Crew.description: If the Catapult Troll wins a Combat, then after making any Strikes, the Goblins may make D6 additional Strikes following all the usual rules. These Strikes are resolved at Strength 3. Note that if the Catapult Troll uses a Brutal Power Attack that immediately ends the Combat, then the Goblins will not get these additional Strikes.
linkedRules: Brutal Power Attack - Attacke mit Brutaler Kraft
Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

Goblin Mastery.name: Goblin Mastery
Goblin Mastery.description: Friendly Moria Goblin models within 6" of the Balrog automatically pass any Courage Tests they are required to make.

Goblin Projectile.name: Goblin Projectile
Goblin Projectile.description: During the Shoot Phase, if the Goblin King is in base contact with a friendly Goblin model and neither are Engaged in Combat, then the Goblin King can make a shooting attack – this has a range of 12" and counts as a throwing weapon. Remove the friendly Goblin model as a casualty, and then make the To Hit Roll and any In The Way Tests as normal. The shot is resolved at a Strength of 8, and any model that is hit will automatically be knocked Prone.
linkedRules: Prone - zu Boden - Modell am Boden

Goldberry is waiting.name: Goldberry is waiting
Goldberry is waiting.description: Goldberry may only be included in your Army if it includes Tom Bombadil. Goldberry must give up a Will Point during the End Phase of any turn in which she was Engaged in Combat. Should Goldberry be reduced to 0 Will Points, or if there are no friendly models on the board other tahn herself and/or Tom Bombadil, then she will simply wander off back to her homestead. Remove Goldberry as a casualty.

Gollum has strong, strangling fingers an.name: Gollum has strong, strangling fingers and so is never considered to be Unarmed – ever! If your opponent does not have a Ringbearer in their Army, then Gollum carries the One Ring.
Gollum has strong, strangling fingers an.description: Gollum has strong, strangling fingers and so is never considered to be Unarmed – ever! If your opponent does not have a Ringbearer in their Army, then Gollum carries the One Ring.

Gothmog’s Right Hand.name: Gothmog’s Right Hand
Gothmog’s Right Hand.description: Whilst Gothmog’s Enforcer is within 3" of Gothmog, then Gothmog can spend Gothmog’s Enforcer’s Will Points to declare a Heroic Move or Heroic March instead of using his own Might Points. Additionally, when Gothmog declares a Heroic Move or Heroic March within 3" of Gothmog’s Enforcer, Gothmog can measure the range of the With Me or At the Double from Gothmog’s Enforcer rather than himself if he wishes.
linkedDetails: Heroic March - Heroischer Marsch - Heroischen Marsch
Heroic Move - Heroische Bewegung  - Heroischen Bewegung

Grasper & Keeper.name: Grasper & Keeper
Grasper & Keeper.description: These are Unique hand weapons. Additionally, a model gains a bonus of +1 to its Attacks characteristic when using Grasper & Keeper, and any To Wound Rolls of a natural 6 that are not prevented will deal 2 Wounds rather than 1.

Grasping Tentacles.name: Grasping Tentacles
Grasping Tentacles.description:
In the Shoot Phase, the Watcher in the Water may make D6 shooting attacks. These have a range of 6", a Strength of 3 and never require In The Way Rolls. The Watcher can still make these shooting attacks regardless of how far it Moved in the Move Phase, and never suffers the -1 penalty for Moving and Shooting.

Additionally, any model that is hit by a tentacle and is not slain will be removed from the board and then placed anywhere in base contact with the Watcher in the Water, as chosen by the Watcher in the Water’s controlling player. A Cavalry model that is hit will have the whole model dragged in this way.

If, for whatever reason, the model cannot be placed in base contact, then it is not moved at all. If a model placed in this way would end up in base contact with other enemy models in addition to the Watcher, then those models do not count as being Engaged in Combat with the placed model unless they subsequently Charge the placed model. The Watcher can still make these shooting attacks whilst it is Engaged in Combat.
linkedRules: Moving and Shooting - Bewegung und Schiessen

alias: Swap hand-and-a-half weapon for great bow
Great bow.name: Great bow
Great bow.description:
Range 24", Strength 4

A model can make a Shooting Attack with a Great bow during the Shoot Phase provided it has not Moved over half its Move Value during the preceding Move Phase.

Gúthwinë.name: Gúthwinë
Gúthwinë.description: This is a Unique hand weapon. Additionally, each time a model armed with Gúthwinë rolls a natural 6 To Wound when making a Strike, they may immediately make a single additional To Wound Roll against the same target. If this additional To Wound Roll is a natural 6, this will not benefit from this special rule.

Haltet Stand.name: Haltet Stand
Haltet Stand.description:
Haltet Stand ist eine Regel, die nur für Muttests von Helden-Modellen im Rahmen der Regeln für eine Aufgeriebene Armee gilt.

Wenn ein Helden-Modell einen Muttest für die Zugehörigkeit zu einer Aufgeriebene Armee ablegt und besteht, muss es am Ende seiner Aktivierung Haltet Stand rufen. Jedes befreundete Krieger-Modell, das innerhalb von 6"um einen Helden, der Haltet Stand gerufen hat, Aktiviert und Sichtlinie zu diesem Helden herstellen kann, besteht automatisch seinen Muttest für die Zugehörigkeit zu einer Aufgeriebene Armee. Andere Helden-Modelle sind von dieser Regel nicht betroffen und legen ihre Muttest wie gewohnt ab.

Beachte, dass Helden-Modelle, die im Nahkampf gebunden sind oder von einer Sonderregel oder Magischen Kraft betroffen sind, die sie an der Aktivierung hindern, nicht Aktiviert werden können und diesen Muttest nicht ablegen müssen. Daher können sie auch kein Haltet Stand einsetzen.

Hadhafang.name: Hadhafang
Hadhafang.description: This is a Unique Elven hand-and-a-half weapon. Additionally, a model wielding Hadhafang gains a bonus of +1 To Wound when making Strikes against a Spirit model.
linkedRules: Strikes - Schlägt - Schläge - Schlägen - Zuschlagen - Zuschlägt

alias: An amalgamation of grasping spectral hands
Handwaffe.name: Handwaffe
